posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Peterpirol - here is a link to some information on how to use the Formula Column.

The Formula Column – Support (monday.com)

Also, here is a list of the functions available: List of all available formulas – Support (monday.com)

Although, there is a lot of other formulas available that are not documented within monday. @JCorrell does a nice job of documenting these here

Thanks!
Mark
